name: Pepper Pasta Sheryl House Fgkg27a
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small amount of olive oil in a pan.
2. Add the garlic and julienne peppers, and sauté until fragrant.
3. Add Tabasco sauce, sliced mushrooms, tomatoes, salt, pepper, tomato paste, and chopped parsley to the pan.
4. Stir everything together well.
5. Add the chopped pepperoni and cook for about 45 minutes or until all ingredients are tender and fully cooked.
6. Serve the pasta over warm pasta. Enjoy!
